# OperStack (full)

> The operating stack for inbound leads.

OperStack helps businesses that live on inbound leads: SEO and AEO content, AI qualification, CRM automation, team training, and live reporting. One Lead Hub connects every module.

OperStack is a **standalone B2B brand**. It is not a real estate agency site. EstateOS is an optional vertical module for property businesses.

## Primary pages

- https://oper-stack.com/ — interactive system map (9 modules + Lead Hub)
- https://oper-stack.com/pricing/ — audit (free), setup, retainer
- https://oper-stack.com/audit/ — free Lead Gen stack audit form
- https://oper-stack.com/guides/ — lead operations guides index

## Guides

- https://oper-stack.com/guides/lead-ops-stack/ — What is a lead ops stack; architecture and modules
- https://oper-stack.com/guides/ai-lead-qualification/ — AI qualification, routing, governance
- https://oper-stack.com/guides/crm-automation-inbound/ — CRM lifecycle, tags, field ownership
- https://oper-stack.com/guides/programmatic-seo-lead-gen/ — Programmatic SEO for lead generation
- https://oper-stack.com/guides/lead-routing-playbook/ — Lead routing precedence and SLA
- https://oper-stack.com/guides/aeo-geo-inbound-marketing/ — AEO and GEO for inbound teams
- https://oper-stack.com/guides/sales-team-onboarding-ai/ — AI-assisted sales onboarding gates
- https://oper-stack.com/guides/lead-attribution-inbound/ — Inbound attribution and reconciliation
- https://oper-stack.com/guides/sla-speed-to-lead/ — Speed-to-lead SLA design and measurement
- https://oper-stack.com/guides/lead-hub-vs-crm/ — Lead Hub vs CRM ownership boundary

## Modules (system map)

1. SEO + AEO Site — organic acquisition
2. AI Lead Qualification — 24/7 response and scoring
3. CRM Automation — pipeline ops and webhooks
4. Call Analytics — QA and script gaps
5. Reporting Engine — dashboards and source ROI
6. Content Engine — editorial factory
7. Social Distribution — RSS syndication
8. News + Shorts — signal layer for freshness
9. Team Training — onboarding and CRM certification gates
10. Lead Hub (center) — routing, attribution, SLA, audit log

## Pricing summary

| Plan | Price | Best for |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Audit | Free | Stack review and action list |
| Setup | Custom quote | Lead Hub + 3 to 5 modules launch |
| Retainer | Custom quote | Ongoing ops, content, enablement |

## Definitions (citability)

**Lead ops stack:** Connected systems that capture, qualify, route, and report on inbound leads through one Lead Hub.

**Lead Hub:** Routing and analytics control point above channel tools and CRM; owns stages, tags, SLAs, and source attribution.

**AI lead qualification:** Scripted conversational AI that scores inbound chats and routes qualified leads into CRM with context.

## Contact

- Email: info@oper-stack.com
- Website: https://oper-stack.com

## Topics

Lead operations, inbound automation, programmatic SEO for B2B, AI lead qualification, CRM routing, sales team onboarding, marketing ops dashboards, AEO, GEO citability.
